chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.1717 of 2025 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of bail application 06.10.2025 Mr. Asif Ali Jokhio, advocate for applicant Mr. Sagheer Ali Solangi, advocate for complainant Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, APG ----- It is stated that seven witnesses have been examined, and they have prima facie involved the applicant in the present case. Learned APG submits that in two months’ time remaining witnesses would be examined and the case would probably be concluded. To this proposal, counsel for the applicant has agreed. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial Court is directed to examine all the remaining witnesses without fail in two months’ time and decide the case. However, in any case, the case is not decided within the stipulated period, the applicant would be at liberty to move a fresh bail application before the trial Court, which if filed, shall however be decided on its own merits. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
